query: extreme harsh chiaroscuro single light source dramatic black abstract shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: extreme chiaroscuro — single-source dramatic, abstract black/shadow play, deep contrast pushed to graphic abstraction

response.objective_caption: A tightly cropped portrait of a shirtless man with short, light-colored hair and visible stubble against a completely black background. Intense warm light illuminates the right side of his face, revealing one eye, a furrowed brow, his nose, lips, and jawline, while the left side of his face and shoulder recede into total darkness. He looks directly at the camera.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A tightly cropped portrait of a shirtless man against a black background, rendered with extreme underexposure that crushes the left half of his face and body into total, detail-swallowing shadow. The illuminated skin is bathed in a sickly orange-yellow cast that suggests an unhealthy, contaminated tint. The oppressive interplay of blinding darkness and jaundiced light creates an atmosphere of dread and unease, while the subject’s furrowed brow and tense gaze reinforce the distressed mood.
